title: Junior Frontend Developer at Infosys Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Infosys Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Infosys Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!
